narrative:
Tuscarawas 1 (precinct in Stark County) has 759 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points.
